body:
In an elegant ode to Milan, the mood of the 2025 Collection, curated by Creative Director Vincent Van Duysen, is inspired by the unparalleled design legacy of the city as it draws upon the Molteni&C designs from the 1970s and 1980s and reinterprets them for contemporary, open-plan living spaces. 

Watch the full video with Vincent Van Duysen at the link in bio.

@vincentvanduysen @vincenvanduysenarchitects 
#MolteniGroup #design #NewCollection

body:
Letters to Milan, an installation by @studioklass 
8-13 April 2025
Museo Poldi Pezzoli, Via Manzoni 12, Milan

Milan has witnessed the birth and growth of Molteni&C in constant dialogue with leading figures in architecture and design: Gio Ponti, Bruno Morassutti and Angelo Mangiarotti, Aldo Rossi, and Herzog & de Meuron. Letters to Milan celebrates this legacy by transforming the space into a metaphor for the city. 

Open to the public: Museo Poldi Pezzoli, Via Manzoni 12, Milan
Visiting hours:
Wednesday: 10am – 7.30pm
Thursday – Friday: 10am – 6.30pm
Saturday: 10am – 9pm
Sunday: 10am – 7pm

Quote curated by Doppiozero @00doppiozero 

#MolteniGroup #MDW25

Molteni&C celebrates design week with two installations at Museo Poldi Pezzoli.

Letters to Milan, an installation by @studioklass 

And

Gio Ponti Objects curated by @elisaossinostudio 

8-13 April 2025
Museo Poldi Pezzoli, Via Manzoni 12, Milan

An experience to be lived, felt, and remembered.

Open to the public: Museo Poldi Pezzoli, Via Manzoni 12, Milan
Visiting hours:
Wednesday: 10am – 7.30pm
Thursday – Friday: 10am – 6.30pm
Saturday: 10am – 9pm
Sunday: 10am – 7pm

Gio Ponti Archives - Archivio storico Eredi Gio Ponti @giopontiofficial

body:
Gio Ponti Objects, an installation by @elisaossinostudio 
8-13 April 2025
Museo Poldi Pezzoli, Via Manzoni 12, Milan

Inside the Armory of Museo Poldi Pezzoli, Gio Ponti Objects by Elisa Ossino Studio presents Molteni&C first collection of objects by the design maestro. Beautiful (im)possible objects.

Open to the public: Museo Poldi Pezzoli, Via Manzoni 12, Milan
Visiting hours:
Thursday – Friday: 10am – 6.30pm
Saturday: 10am – 9pm
Sunday: 10am – 7pm

© Gio Ponti Archives - Archivio storico Eredi Gio Ponti @giopontiofficial 

#MolteniGroup #MDW25

Celebrating MDW 2025
 
Molteni&C’s celebrations for Milan Design Week began with a special reception in the secret gardens of Museo Poldi Pezzoli.

Guests had the opportunity to enjoy a private visit of the two MDW installations: “Letters to Milan” by Studio Klass and “Gio Ponti Objects” by Elisa Ossino Studio.
 
@fev_production 
@adamas.caviar 
@ferraritrento 
#MolteniGroup #MDW25

WWW.ANITALIANDESIGNSTORY.COM

body:
Palazzo Molteni Tokyo

Now celebrating its grand opening, Palazzo Molteni Tokyo is conceived as a sculpture — an architectural expression of the Molteni&C home and lifestyle, in the heart of the Japanese capital. The building is the first architectural project in Japan by Belgian architect Vincent Van Duysen, Molteni&C’s Creative Director since 2016.

The façade is defined by a refined, elegant composition of solids and voids, as if sculpted from a monolithic block.

A sequence of stacked, offset blocks — interrupted by darkened voids and modernist-inspired metallic elements — creates a sense of rhythm and depth. Visually, the façade appears dynamic yet never repetitive, with each side offering a unique perspective.

#MolteniGroup #Design
